entities.name: UAV BASED REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Remote sensing using unmanned aerial vehicles for agricultural monitoring

entities.name: PRECISION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A farming management concept based on observing, measuring and responding to inter and intra-field variability in crops

entities.name: CROP SEGMENTATION
entities.description: The process of partitioning a digital image of a crop into multiple segments to facilitate monitoring

entities.name: UAV IMAGES
entities.description: Images captured by unmanned aerial vehicles used as input for crop segmentation

entities.name: ILLUMINATION CONDITIONS
entities.description: Various lighting environments that can make crop extraction difficult

entities.name: THRESHOLD-BASED METHODS
entities.description: Simple segmentation techniques that use a threshold value to separate pixels

entities.name: TWO-DIMENSIONAL HISTOGRAM
entities.description: A proposed segmentation method utilizing gray level and relative entropy of neighboring pixels

entities.name: RELATIVE ENTROPY THRESHOLDING
entities.description: A technique used to obtain the optimal threshold by minimizing relative entropy criteria

entities.name: GRAY LEVEL OF PIXELS
entities.description: The intensity value of pixels used in the construction of the two-dimensional histogram

entities.name: RELATIVE ENTROPY
entities.description: A measure of the difference between two probability distributions used for thresholding

entities.name: CONTRAST ENHANCED IMAGE
entities.description: An image processed to improve contrast before segmentation

entities.name: LOGICAL AND OPERATOR
entities.description: A boolean operator used to extract crops from the segmented image and CIELAB color space

entities.name: CIELAB COLOR SPACE
entities.description: A color space used in conjunction with the segmented image for crop extraction

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop used to evaluate the proposed segmentation method

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal grain crop used to evaluate the proposed segmentation method

entities.name: MISCLASSIFICATION ERROR
entities.description: A performance metric used to compare segmentation methods

entities.name: DICE COEFFICIENT
entities.description: A spatial overlap index used to evaluate segmentation accuracy

entities.name: JACCARD INDEX
entities.description: A statistic used for gauging the similarity and diversity of sample sets in segmentation

entities.name: OTSU METHOD
entities.description: A common threshold-based segmentation method used for comparison

entities.name: KAPUR METHOD
entities.description: A threshold-based segmentation method based on entropy used for comparison
